prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年最低位次分别为 2451→4913→4299→10058→5347 名，整体呈大幅波动后移趋势；2024 年骤降至 10058 名（受新高考模式切换影响），2025 年回升至 5347 名，较 2024 年前移约 4711 名，显示报考热度有所恢复但尚未回到 2021–2023 年水平；本省理科/物理类计划 2021–2025 年分别为 52→53→47→48→49 人，基本稳定在 47–53 人区间；2026 年计划 40 人，较 2025 年缩招 9 人（-18.4%），缩招幅度较大，对竞争有显著加剧作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流高校；软科中国大学排名 2026 年第 19 名（Top20），近年排名稳定在 13–19 名区间，属全国顶尖综合类师范学府；2026 年声誉评价为中性/混合，主要涉及学校管理回应类事件，无重大负面舆情；抖音热度排名第 37（较热），短视频曝光量中等偏上；2022 年曾出现江西省投档线位次大幅下降的异常信号，但近年已恢复稳定；教育学 A+、心理学 A+、地理学 A+、数学 A、环境科学与工程 A、生态学 A、统计学 A、物理学 A-、化学 A-、系统科学 A- 等共 18 个 A- 及以上学科，理学与教育学实力突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类（2024 年 ，推荐）、电子信息/通信（76.86，高热推荐）、电气工程（74.28，高热推荐）等理工类专业社会热度持续偏热，北师大相关专业（计算机、人工智能、物理等）受益于整 体工科热度；本省 2026 年物理类考生 167419 人，较 2025 年（173347 人）减少约 3.4%，变化幅度较小；北京师范大学位于北京，属一线城市，对山西考生有较强地域吸引力；该校在山西招生占比约 2.5%–4.7%（2025 年总招生 28 人），属中等偏下水平，非主要生源省份。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 5347 名、2026 年大幅缩招 18.4% 及本省物理类考生仅微减 3.4% 等因素：缩招幅度远超考生减少幅度，竞争显著加剧，位次应后移；同时学校层次顶尖、声誉稳定、理学学科优势突出，对中高分段考生仍有较强吸引力。预测 2026 年最低位次约 4858 名，区间 4358–5358 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings were 2451→4913→4299→10058→5347 respectively, showing a trend of significant fluctuation and backward shift; in 2024, it sharply dropped to 10058 (affected by the new Gaokao model transition), and in 2025 it rebounded to 5347, moving forward by about 4711 places compared to 2024, indicating a recovery in application popularity but not yet returning to the 2021–2023 level; the provincial science/physics category enrollment plan from 2021 to 2025 was 52→53→47→48→49 respectively, basically stable in the 47–53 range; the 2026 plan is 40, a reduction of 9 (-18.4%) compared to 2025, a significant reduction that will notably intensify competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class university; ranked 19th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings (Top20), with stable rankings in the 13–19 range in recent years, belonging to a top-tier comprehensive normal university nationwide; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving school management response incidents, with no major negative public opinion; Douyin popularity ranking 37th (relatively hot), short video exposure moderately high; in 2022, there was an abnormal signal of a significant drop in the Jiangxi provincial admission ranking, but it has stabilized in recent years; Education A+, Psychology A+, Geography A+, Mathematics A, Environmental Science and Engineering A, Ecology A, Statistics A, Physics A-, Chemistry A-, Systems Science A-, etc., a total of 18 A- and above disciplines, with strong strengths in science and education.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science (2024, recommended), Electronic Information/Communication (76.86, high heat recommended), Electrical Engineering (74.28, high heat recommended) and other science and engineering majors continue to have high social popularity; BNU's related majors (Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Physics, etc.) benefit from the overall engineering heat; the province's 2026 physics category examinees are 167,419, a decrease of about 3.4% from 2025 (173,347), a small change; Beijing Normal University is located in Beijing, a first-tier city, with strong regional appeal to Shanxi examinees; the university's enrollment proportion in Shanxi is about 2.5%–4.7% (28 total enrolled in 2025), at a moderately low level, not a major source province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 5347, the significant 18.4% enrollment reduction in 2026, and the provincial physics category examinees only slightly decreasing by 3.4%: the reduction rate far exceeds the decrease in examinees, competition significantly intensifies, and rankings should shift backward; at the same time, the university's top-tier level, stable reputation, and strong science discipline advantages still have strong appeal to mid-to-high score segments. Predict the 2026 minimum ranking to be about 4858, with a range of 4358–5358.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 4358–5358, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, Tier 1 majors as a reach, and Tier 3 majors as safety; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 4358), you can focus on reaching for the Li Yun Experimental Class and popular majors like Mathematics and Computer Science; if your ranking is near the upper limit of the range (around 5358), you should mainly choose Tier 2 majors like Geographical Science, Chemistry, and Biological Sciences, with Tier 3 majors like Business Administration and Public Administration as safe backups.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings were 213 → 629 → 480 → 447 → 274, showing an overall trend of first decreasing then increasing; after a significant drop to 629 in 2022, rankings have gradually moved up in the past three years, rising to 274 in 2025, an advance of about 173 places compared to 2024, indicating a rebound in application popularity; the provincial history category enrollment plans from 2021 to 2024 were 29 → 29 → 25 → 23, gradually decreasing year by year; the 2025 (history category) plan is 20, and the 2026 plan is 18, a reduction of 2 (-10%) compared to 2025, which intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class university; ranked 19th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings (Top20), with stable rankings in the 13–19 range in recent years, making it a top-tier normal university nationwide; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving school management response incidents, with no major negative public opinion; Douyin popularity ranking is 37th (relatively popular), with medium-to-high short video exposure; in 2022, there was an abnormal signal of a significant drop in the Jiangxi provincial admission line ranking, but it has stabilized in recent years; Education A+, Psychology A+, Chinese Language and Literature A+, Chinese History A+, Geography A+, Marxist Theory A+, Mathematics A, Environmental Science and Engineering A, Ecology A, Statistics A, and a total of 18 A- and above disciplines, demonstrating strong academic strength and strong appeal to candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity of teacher/education majors shows divergence and wait-and-see (2024), law is relatively hot (63.54), Chinese language/literature is recommended (60.0); the province's 2026 history category candidates are 63,113, a significant decrease of about 25.6% compared to 2025 (84,879), greatly alleviating competitive pressure; Beijing Normal University is located in Beijing, a first-tier city, with strong regional appeal to Shanxi candidates; the university's enrollment proportion in Shanxi is about 2.5%–4.7% (total enrollment of 28 in 2025), which is moderately low, not a major source province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 274, the 2026 enrollment reduction of 10%, and the significant decrease of about 25.6% in provincial history category candidates: the reduction in candidates far exceeds the enrollment reduction, overall competition is significantly weakened, and rankings should move up; at the same time, the university's top-tier level, stable reputation, and numerous advantageous disciplines still strongly attract high-scoring candidates. The predicted 2026 minimum ranking is about 250, with a range of 220–280.
